title: No consumer lag monitoring — silent event processing delay undetected
expected_feedback: Standard: No consumer lag monitoring configured. Consumer lag (latest offset minus committed offset) is the primary health metric for any Kafka consumer. Without monitoring, a consumer that falls behind (due to slow processing, resource exhaustion, or partial failure) creates a growing delay between event production and processing — invisible until it causes a business incident. Fix: export consumer_lag metric per partition via JMX or kafka-consumer-groups.sh, set alert threshold (e.g., >5000 messages for >5 minutes), and integrate into the service dashboard.
violated_rule: Consumer lag monitoring with alert threshold defined
